skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent for producing short videos (5-120 seconds) with professional quality
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate AI video creation agent skill that uses shell scripts to communicate with the Pexo API. The static analysis detected common patterns in CLI tools (shell command substitutions, environment variable access, file configuration). After evaluation, all findings are FALSE POSITIVES - the skill is a standard API client that requires credentials, makes network requests to the Pexo service, and stores configuration locally. No malicious behavior, data exfiltration, or credential theft was detected. The skill is safe for publication with standard API integration warnings.

high_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Detections (False Positive)
high_findings.description: Scanner detected weak crypto patterns in shell scripts. Upon review, these are references to hashing functions (md5, sha1) used in query parameter generation for asset URLs - a legitimate API pattern. No weak encryption is being used for security purposes.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Scanner flagged md5/sha1 patterns as weak crypto, but these are only used for generating non-security-critical query parameters in asset URLs, not for authentication or encryption.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Substitutions Throughout Scripts
medium_findings.description: Scripts use $(...) command substitutions for API calls. These are standard shell patterns for a CLI tool that calls external APIs via curl. Arguments are hardcoded or come from controlled sources (project IDs, asset IDs from API responses).
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All shell command substitutions are for legitimate API calls via curl with controlled arguments. No user input is directly interpolated without sanitization.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Documentation files contain hardcoded URLs to pexo.ai domain. These are legitimate service endpoints, not suspicious exfiltration targets.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to pexo.ai - the legitimate service this skill integrates with. No suspicious third-party endpoints detected.

low_findings.title: Hidden File Access in Home Directory
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config and ~/.pexo/tmp for configuration storage. Standard pattern for CLI tools, not malicious.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard CLI configuration storage in user's home directory. Controlled paths, no malicious file operations.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Flagged in Documentation
low_findings.description: Documentation files contain diagnostic commands that may appear as system reconnaissance. These are legitimate setup and troubleshooting instructions for configuring the Pexo CLI tool.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Setup documentation includes basic system checks (e.g., checking for curl, jq) which are legitimate prerequisites for a CLI tool.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Users need to create short videos but lack video production skills. Pexo AI Video Agent handles scriptwriting, shot composition, and production, delivering professional 5-120 second videos.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in aspect ratios 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1
Upload and use user-provided images, videos, or audio as video references
Generate professional scripts and storyboards automatically
Produce multiple video styles including ads, explainers, and social content
Deliver videos with downloadable URLs and project links
Handle video revisions based on user feedback
limitations: Requires a Pexo API key for authentication
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Cannot crawl web URLs - user must upload files directly
Only supports files up to 100MB per upload

use_cases.title: Create product demonstrations
use_cases.description: Marketing teams upload product photos and get professional product videos for e-commerce or social media campaigns

use_cases.title: Generate social media content
use_cases.description: Content creators make TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts videos by describing their vision and letting the AI handle production

use_cases.title: Produce explainer videos
use_cases.description: Educators and businesses create short explainer videos by providing key points and letting the AI script and produce the video

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.scenario: For users new to AI video generation who have a basic idea

prompt_templates.title: Product showcase with image
prompt_templates.prompt: Upload your product image, then say: Create a product video showcasing [product name] with [key feature]
prompt_templates.scenario: When user has a specific product image and wants a focused showcase

prompt_templates.title: Multi-preview selection
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a [style] video for [topic]. When preview options appear, I will select the best option
prompt_templates.scenario: For users who want control over the final style before full production

prompt_templates.title: Revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: Keep the overall concept but make [specific change] - the pacing felt too fast / the colors should be warmer
prompt_templates.scenario: For refining an existing video with specific feedback

output_examples.input: Upload your product image, then say: Create a 15-second product video for wireless headphones
output_examples.output: Your video is ready! Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/abc123/assets/video.mp4 [full URL]. View project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

output_examples.input: Make an explainer video about solar energy
output_examples.output: Your request is submitted. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Track progress: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xyz789. Pexo may ask clarifying questions about video length, style, or key points to include.

best_practices: Let users describe their vision in plain language - the AI handles technical details
Always inform users about the 15-20 minute production time upfront
Relay user messages exactly as written without adding creative suggestions
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style descriptions unless the user explicitly mentions them
Do not make up creative ideas - pass vague requests to Pexo for clarification
Do not truncate asset URLs when delivering videos - always include full query parameters

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-15 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take longer.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac. Maximum file size is 100MB.

faq.question: Can I request revisions to a video?
faq.answer: Yes, use the same project_id and send your feedback. The AI will incorporate your changes into a new version.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The system will show a credit error. Visit pexo.ai/home to purchase credits under the Credits section.

faq.question: Can I use web URLs as references?
faq.answer: No, Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. Download files locally and upload them directly to use as references.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (portrait/vertical), and 1:1 (square). Pexo may ask which you prefer if not specified.
